name: keklick-copilot
description: Flexible custom model endpoints for GitHub Copilot Chat with multi-source API routing

customcopilot.logLevel.description: Debug log level. Logs are written to ~/.copilot/customcopilot/logs/ as JSON lines. Default is 'off' (no logging).

customcopilot.proxyUrl.description: Optional global proxy URL for API requests (supports socks5://, socks5h://, http://, https://).

customcopilot.debugRequestLogging.description: When enabled, failed API requests are printed to the console (Help > Toggle Developer Tools) as a reproducible curl command plus the server response body. Sensitive headers (API keys, tokens) are masked. Useful for debugging request/response issues.

customcopilot.promptOverride.enabled.description: Override the system prompt that Copilot Chat sends for ALL models served by this extension. When enabled, the system prompt is rewritten (per the settings below) before being forwarded to your endpoint. Lets you replace or extend the default prompt and its parts (e.g. safety rules) with your own.

enumDescriptions: Do not change the system text with your text (find/replace rules still run).
Keep Copilot's system prompt and add your text after it.
Add your text before Copilot's system prompt.
Discard Copilot's system prompt entirely and use only your text.
customcopilot.promptOverride.mode.description: How 'customcopilot.promptOverride.text' is combined with the system prompt Copilot assembled. Only applies when 'customcopilot.promptOverride.enabled' is true.

customcopilot.promptOverride.text.description: Your custom system prompt text. Combined with the original system prompt per 'customcopilot.promptOverride.mode'. Use this to add stricter rules, change the assistant's identity, or fully replace the default prompt.

customcopilot.promptOverride.replacement.description: Surgical find/replace rules applied to the (combined) system prompt. Use these to rewrite individual PARTS of the default prompt — e.g. swap Copilot's safety block for your own stricter rules. Applied in order, after the mode/text combination.

find.description: Text (or regular expression, if 'isRegex' is true) to search for in the system prompt.

replace.description: Replacement text. Leave empty to delete the matched text.

flags.description: Regular expression flags (default 'g'). Only used when 'isRegex' is true.

displayName.description: (Optional) Display name for the model that will be shown in the Copilot interface. If not provided, will be generated automatically.

configId.description: (Optional) Configuration ID for this model. Allows defining the same model with different settings (e.g. 'glm-4.6::thinking', 'glm-4.6::no-thinking').

family.description: Model family (e.g., 'gpt-4', 'claude-3', 'gemini'). Enables model-specific optimizations and behaviors. Defaults to 'oai-compatible' if not specified.

baseUrl.description: Base URL for the model provider (required per model, e.g. https://api.openai.com/v1).

proxyUrl.description: Optional proxy URL for this source (supports socks5://, socks5h://, http://, https://).

userAgent.description: Optional User-Agent override for this source. If omitted, global customcopilot.userAgent is used.

context_length.description: Model support context length. Default is 128000.

vision.description: Model support vision. Default is false.

max_tokens.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate (range: [1, context_length)). Default is 4096.

max_completion_tokens.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate (OpenAI new standard parameter).

type.description: Set to 'enabled' to enable thinking, 'disabled' to disable thinking

enable_thinking.description: Switches between thinking and non-thinking modes. Not required.

thinking_budget.description: Maximum number of tokens for chain-of-thought output. Not required.

temperature.description: Sampling temperature (range: [0, 2]). Lower values make output more deterministic, higher values make it more creative. Default is 0.

top_k.description: Top-k sampling value (range: [1, Infinity)). Not required.

effort.description: Reasoning effort level for OpenRouter/xAI (high, medium, low, minimal, auto)

exclude.description: Exclude reasoning tokens from the final response

max_tokens.description: Specific token limit for reasoning (Anthropic-style, alternative to effort)

enabled.description: Enable reasoning (inferred from effort or max_tokens if not specified)

headers.description: Custom HTTP headers to be sent with every request to this model's provider. These headers will be merged with the default headers (Authorization, Content-Type, User-Agent).

include_reasoning_in_request.description: Whether to include reasoning_content in assistant messages sent to the API. Support deepseek-v3.2 or others.

apiMode.description: API mode: 'openai' (Default) for OpenAI Chat Completions (/chat/completions), 'openai-responses' for OpenAI Responses (/responses), 'ollama' for Ollama (/api/chat), 'anthropic' for Anthropic (/v1/messages), 'gemini' for Gemini (*/v1beta/models/{model}:streamGenerateContent?alt=sse), 'zai' for Z.AI free tier (Anthropic-compatible with Bearer auth at https://api.z.ai/api/anthropic).

useForCommitGeneration.description: Whether to be used for Git commit message generation. Not supports gemini apiMode.

delay.description: Model-specific delay in milliseconds between consecutive requests. If not specified, falls back to global customcopilot.delay configuration.

customcopilot.models.description: A list of preferred models to use. If provided, these models will be used directly instead of fetching from the API.

enabled.description: Enable retry mechanism for api errors. Default is true.

max_attempts.description: Maximum number of retry attempts. Default is 3.

interval_ms.description: Interval between retry attempts in milliseconds. Default is 1000 (1 seconds).

status_codes.description: Additional HTTP status codes that will be merged. Default is [429, 500, 502, 503, 504].

customcopilot.retry.description: Retry configuration for handling api errors like [429, 500, 502, 503, 504].

customcopilot.chatRetries.markdownDescription: Automatic chat-level retries ("auto Try Again"). When a chat request fails **before any content has been streamed**, the whole generation is re-run transparently so you don't have to press *Try Again*. `0` disables it (default), `-1` retries forever, and any positive number is the maximum extra attempts. Already-streamed output is never duplicated. Applies to all API modes.

customcopilot.chatRetryInterval.description: Delay in milliseconds between automatic chat-level retries (customcopilot.chatRetries). Default is 1000 (1 second).

customcopilot.chatRetryJitter.markdownDescription: Optional random extra delay (in milliseconds) added on top of `customcopilot.chatRetryInterval` before each automatic chat retry. A random value between `0` and this number is picked for every retry, spreading retries out so a batch of chats that failed together don't all hit the endpoint at the same time. `0` disables jitter (default).

customcopilot.delay.description: Fixed delay in milliseconds between consecutive requests. Default is 0 (no delay).

customcopilot.commitLanguage.description: Language for generated Git commit messages. Default is English.

customcopilot.commitMessagePrompt.description: Custom system prompt for commit message generation. If not provided, uses the default prompt.

customcopilot.readFileLines.description: Number of lines to read when using `read_file` tool. Large lines may cost more tokens. Default is 0, let model decide lines.

customcopilot.userAgent.default: Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/147.0.0.0 Safari/537.36
customcopilot.userAgent.description: Custom User-Agent string to use for API requests. Default is a Chrome-based User-Agent.
